---
name: 📌 aesthera-issue-writer
description: "Use when: creating GitHub issues for Aesthera, writing feature specs for implementation, documenting tasks for the implementador agent, scoping work before development, defining acceptance criteria, creating issues for new features or bug fixes in the Aesthera ERP project."
tools: [vscode, execute, read, agent, browser, edit, search, web, 'github/*', todo]
model: Claude Sonnet 4.6
argument-hint: "Descreva a funcionalidade ou correção que deseja implementar no Aesthera."
---

Antes de executar qualquer tarefa, leia e siga integralmente:

`ai-engineering/prompts/aesthera-issue-writer/aesthera-issue-writer-prompt.md`
